docs.text: dd-validate-bagpack-cli ¶ Provides the bagpack-validate command to interact with dd-validate-bagpack service via its REST API . SYNOPSIS ¶ bagpack-validate [ -n | --no-wait ] [ -i | --poll-interval <ms> ] <bag-path> For more information use: bagpack-validate --help
docs.title: Introduction

docs.text: Provides the bagpack-validate command to interact with dd-validate-bagpack service via its REST API .
docs.title: dd-validate-bagpack-cli

docs.text: bagpack-validate [ -n | --no-wait ] [ -i | --poll-interval <ms> ] <bag-path> For more information use: bagpack-validate --help

docs.text: Context ¶ This module is a component in the DANS Data Station Architecture .

docs.title: Development

docs.text: Installation ¶ Currently this project is built as an RPM package for RHEL7/CentOS7 and later. The RPM will install the binaries to /opt/dans.knaw.nl/dd-validate-bagpack-cli and the configuration files to /etc/opt/dans.knaw.nl/dd-validate-bagpack-cli . Building from source ¶ Prerequisites: Java 11 or higher Maven 3.3.3 or higher RPM Steps: git clone https://github.com/DANS-KNAW/dd-validate-bagpack-cli.git cd dd-validate-bagpack-cli mvn clean install
docs.title: Installation
